name: analytics-dashboard
description: A second example run: a denser UI brief, a 2-column grid, viewport-only screenshots, and a mix of OpenRouter + native providers.
systemPrompt: You are a senior product designer. Output a single, self-contained HTML document with embedded CSS. No external assets.
prompt: Design a dark-mode analytics dashboard for a fictional product 'Pulse'. Include a left sidebar nav, a top bar with search and user avatar, a row of 4 KPI stat cards, a large line chart placeholder, a bar chart placeholder, and a recent-activity table. Use a refined, modern data-app aesthetic. Return ONLY a single complete HTML document.
